name: group_chat
description: This repo contains:  - A minimal Telegram bot (currently **echoes**; placeholder for AI logic).  - An integration test that **sends a message to the bot and waits for the bot's reply**.

scripts.pm2:stop: npx pm2 stop group_chat_bot daily_report_job weekly_report_job monthly_report_job morning_plan_job
scripts.pm2:delete: npx pm2 delete group_chat_bot daily_report_job weekly_report_job monthly_report_job morning_plan_job
